return(function(m,c,d,b,E,L,t,X,N,U,P,G,j,A,q,f,w,K,s,Z,T,O,l,Y,D)T,A,U,X,f,N,D,Y,w,P,O,K,G,s,l,j,q,Z=function(m,C)local c=O(C)local d=function(d,b)return w(m,{d,b},C,c)end return d end,function(w,d,b,E)local PG={}local
